title: Soak Test - Headset connected, app in the foreground, idle
scenario: App remains responsive and does not crash after prolonged idle soak test on Home Screen with paired headset
steps: 1. Install and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Pair the Poly Bluetooth headset with the app via the Home screen.
3. Navigate to the app Home screen.
4. Leave the phone idle with the app in the foreground for multiple hours (preferably overnight).
5. After several hours, check whether the app is still running and responsive.
expected: The app remains running and responsive after prolonged idle time. No crashes, freezes, or memory-related issues occur.
